g.text: G5 The gesture economy inverted — from solitary to social

Share of all gesture ticks. Pale grey = solitary gestures (thinking, curious, bored); warm = welcome. V5's light mostly gestured to itself; by V6.5 its most frequent gesture greeted someone. (Repertoire also grew between eras — behaviour and vocabulary changed together.)
